name: ASRock B550 PG Riptide ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550 Chipset - Supports DDR4-4933+(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - M.2 Key E for WiFi - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - HDMI - Killer E3100G 2.5G LAN
shortName: ASRock B550 PG Riptide ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550
description: ASRock B550 ATX motherboard with PCIe 4.0 support and WiFi for AMD Ryzen gaming builds.
